message:
feat(playbook): Add local schemas and feedbackEvents support

Enhances playbook module with embedded Zod schemas for standalone validation
and improved feedback tracking structure:

## Local Schema Definitions

Added inline Zod schemas to enable playbook.ts to work independently:

- FeedbackEventSchema: Validates feedback events with timestamp, type
  (helpful/harmful), optional sessionId and reason
- PlaybookBulletSchema: Complete bullet validation including all fields:
  id, content, category, tags, type, isNegative, state, maturity,
  helpfulCount, harmfulCount, feedbackEvents, confidenceDecayHalfLifeDays,
  pinned, sourceSessions, sourceAgents, createdAt, updatedAt,
  effectiveScore (optional), deprecated (optional)
- PlaybookMetadataSchema: Validates playbook metadata structure
- PlaybookSchema: Full playbook document validation

## Bullet Structure Updates

- Added feedbackEvents array to addBullet() output to maintain both
  the legacy helpfulEvents/harmfulEvents arrays AND the unified
  feedbackEvents array (supports both old and new consumption patterns)
- Ensures backward compatibility with existing playbook files

## Design Rationale

While types.ts contains the canonical schemas, having local schemas in
playbook.ts allows:
1. Module to be imported without full types dependency
2. Stricter local validation before persistence
3. Clear documentation of expected structure
